creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Thu Jan 31 19:20:46 2013
New Revision: 311327
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/311327

Log:
  Low-level, data-driven core of boto 3.
  
  WWW: https://github.com/boto/botocore
  
  PR:		174673
  Submitted by:	Alexey V. Degtyarev <alexey@renatasystems.org>

Added:
  head/devel/py-botocore/
  head/devel/py-botocore/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-botocore/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-botocore/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-botocore/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Thu Jan 31 19:15:28 2013	(r311326)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Thu Jan 31 19:20:46 2013	(r311327)
@@ -3369,6 +3369,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-bitarray
     SUBDIR += py-bitstring
     SUBDIR += py-boto
+    SUBDIR += py-botocore
     SUBDIR += py-cclib
     SUBDIR += py-celementtree
     SUBDIR += py-celery

Added: head/devel/py-botocore/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-botocore/Makefile	Thu Jan 31 19:20:46 2013	(r311327)
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# Created by: Alexey V. Degtyarev <alexey@renatasystems.org>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	botocore
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.1
+CATEGORIES=	devel python
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+
+MAINTAINER=	alexey@renatasystems.org
+COMMENT=	Low-level, core functionality of boto 3
+
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}dateutil>=2.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dateutil \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}requests>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-requests \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}six>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-six \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sphinx>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-sphinx \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}tox>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-tox
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/py-botocore/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-botocore/distinfo	Thu Jan 31 19:20:46 2013	(r311327)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (botocore-0.4.1.tar.gz) = c065be45a1990e4417e8b11241089024e9e515e0d512a3eb5663e5391000f2ab
+SIZE (botocore-0.4.1.tar.gz) = 290635

Added: head/devel/py-botocore/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/py-botocore/pkg-descr	Thu Jan 31 19:20:46 2013	(r311327)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Low-level, data-driven core of boto 3.
+
+WWW: https://github.com/boto/botocore
